ProLuxe Travel

ProLuxe Bureau, preview

ProLuxe Bureau, for the office

Every booking in one view.

Multi-city itineraries, the principal plus team, conference programmes, all visible from one screen.

How a programme begins

Five steps from enquiry to a live programme.

  1. 01

    Enquiry

    You tell us the shape. Dates, city, the people involved, the room count. We come back with the hotels we recommend and the rates we have agreed in your name.

  2. 02

    Approval

    You confirm the proposal. The rates are fixed, the inventory is held, the hotels know who you are. No moving parts on your end yet.

  3. 03

    Bureau built around the programme

    We configure the dashboard before your team logs in. Hotels, room categories, rates, daily holds, all reflecting what we have already negotiated.

  4. 04

    Access for your office

    You get a sign-in. So does each named member of your team who needs to see bookings. Roles are set per office. Bureau hides what isn't yours.

  5. 05

    Each guest receives a personal link

    On the day you decide, every named guest receives a page built for them. They pick from the rooms held for them, note any preferences, and confirm. About 90 seconds. No account to create. The confirmation lands in Bureau immediately.

Your view

Every booking, visible the moment you log in.

The principal's rooming list, the team's, the full programme. Status flags across every booking: confirmed, pending, payment due. Filter by trip, person, date, or hotel. Nothing to chase, nothing to piece together from emails.

bureau.proluxetravels.com/admin/spring-programme-27

Activity

10:42, today Diana Chen confirmed at Four Seasons des Bergues. Dietary noted.
09:38, today Mandarin Oriental flagged a bath preference for Klaus Müller. Awaiting confirmation.
Yesterday Beau-Rivage held 3 additional rooms for late arrivals.
2 days ago Four Seasons confirmed the contracted rooming list.

Editing in place

Change a date, swap a name, request a room category. No email required.

2 clicks from any row. The change saves immediately, the audit log entry is created, and the booking file is updated. If the hotel needs to be contacted, Bureau flags it. You do not write the email.

bureau.proluxetravels.com/admin/spring-programme-27/muller

Edit booking

Klaus Müller, Mandarin Oriental

Executive king, quiet floor requested. Bath preference flagged by reservations. Change room category or note the preference below.

Arrival 11 Mar, evening
Room Executive king
Preference Bath. Being confirmed.
Status Attention

Save your change and the audit log updates. The file moves forward without a paper trail in your inbox.

Or hand it back to us

One button on any booking. We take it from there.

Bureau is not a self-serve portal that replaces the team. You always have a third option: pass the change request to ProLuxe. We handle the hotel contact, the amendment, the follow-up. You see the result when it lands. This is what makes Bureau different from a booking tool.

bureau.proluxetravels.com/admin/spring-programme-27

Across every programme type

The same screen handles all 3.

A single principal across multiple cities. The principal plus accompanying staff. A conference programme at delegate scale. Bureau does not require a different tool for each. You are not switching views.

Principal, multi-city

One itinerary, several destinations.

Geneva, Singapore, New York across a 3-week trip. All bookings in a single view, filtered by city or date. ProLuxe holds inventory at each property before the itinerary is confirmed.

Principal plus team

The whole party on one rooming list.

The principal, accompanying staff, board observers. Separate rooms, separate preferences, separate arrival times. All visible together. You can filter by person or by hotel without leaving the screen.

Conference programme

Delegate scale, same interface.

Multiple hotels, room blocks held in advance, individual attendee links sent from Bureau. You see the full programme status. ProLuxe manages the hotel relationships. The workload on your desk stays flat regardless of how many delegates are in the list.

The common thread

You choose the level of involvement.

Bureau gives you the view and the tools. ProLuxe stands behind it. At any point on any booking, you can act yourself or pass it to us. The access level is set per office and does not change the interface.

What each booking-holder receives

A personal link, a confirmation, and nothing else to manage.

Each person on the rooming list receives a page built for them. They choose from the rooms ProLuxe has already held, note preferences, and confirm. About 90 seconds. No account to create. You see the confirmation land in Bureau the moment it happens.

bureau.proluxetravels.com/laura

Welcome, Laura

Spring Programme, Geneva

Geneva · March 2027

Choose your room

Beau-Rivage

Lake-view king. 4 minute walk to the venue.

CHF 1,180per night

Four Seasons des Bergues

River-view king. 6 minute walk to the venue.

CHF 1,240per night

Mandarin Oriental

Executive king. 9 minute walk to the venue.

CHF 1,090per night

Preferences

King bed
Quiet floor
Pescatarian. No dairy.
12 March, late evening · LX 351 from London City
A note for the general manager. Anything that needs to be known in advance.

Your stay

Hotel Beau-Rivage
Room Lake-view king
Arrival 12 Mar, late
Departure 14 Mar
Nights 2

The room is held under the principal's allocation. No payment required at this stage. The general manager will be briefed before arrival.

From Danny Barnard <danny@proluxetravels.com>
To Laura Hammond <laura.hammond@example.com>
Date 28 February 2027

Beau-Rivage held, March 2027

Dear Laura,

You are held at Beau-Rivage in March, lake-view king on a quiet floor. The general manager has been briefed on the late arrival, the dietary, and the car at the door.

Confirmation reference is PLX-2703-LH. Anything else you need to add to the file, please send to me directly.

With my best regards,

Danny

ProLuxe Travel

Bureau is built around your programme. We set up the view, hold the inventory, brief the hotels, and hand you access. If a change lands that you would rather not handle, pass it back. That option is always there.

Speak to us about Bureau
